basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) Recruitment 2026: Central Food Technological Research Institute has released the official notification for 1 Project Associate - I posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Karnataka. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years (Relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years)
age_limit.details: Project Associate - I (PAT-I): Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 05 years OBC: 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Food Science & Technology/Food Technology/ Food Science/Food Science and Nutrition/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry OR B.Tech in Food Technology/ Biotechnology/ Food Processing & Engineering/ Food Engineering
qualification.details: Project Associate - I (PAT-I) M.Sc in Food Science & Technology/Food Technology/ Food Science/Food Science and Nutrition/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry B.Tech in Food Technology/ Biotechnology/ Food Processing & Engineering/ Food Engineering Experience: Hands-on experience in protein extraction and characterization, and biochemical analysis (Desirable)

salary_details.details: Project Associate - I (PAT-I): Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.central_food_technological_research_inst: M.Sc in Food Science & Technology/Food Technology/ Food Science/Food Science and Nutrition/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry OR B.Tech in Food Technology/ Biotechnology/ Food Processing & Engineering/ Food Engineering
Max: 35 years (Relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 5 years, OBC: 3 years)

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Project Associate - I Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the CSIR CFTRI Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download CSIR CFTRI Project Associate - I Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Associate - I (PAT-I) M.Sc in Food Science & Technology/Food Technology/ Food Science/Food Science and Nutrition/ Biotechnology/ Biochemistry B.Tech in Food Technology/ Biotechnology/ Food Processing & Engineering/ Food Engineering Experience: Hands-on experience in protein extraction and characterization, and biochemical analysis (Desirable)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Project Associate - I (PAT-I): Maximum age limit is 35 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 05 years OBC: 03 years

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Project Associate - I (PAT-I): Rs. 25,000/- plus HRA

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 31-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for the Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI). It is a premier research institution under the Council of Scientific and Industrial Research.

faq.question: Q2. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Associate - I. This position is project-based and temporary contractual.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Associate - I post in this CSIR CFTRI recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for CSIR CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit online applications for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 is 31 July 2026. Candidates should apply before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate - I post is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women (5 years) and OBC (3 years).

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: Candidates need an M.Sc in Food Science & Technology/Food Technology/Food Science/Food Science and Nutrition/Biotechnology/Biochemistry OR a B.Tech in Food Technology/Biotechnology/Food Processing & Engineering/Food Engineering.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for Project Associate - I at CSIR CFTRI?
faq.answer: The salary for Project Associate - I at CSIR CFTRI is Rs. 25,000/- per month plus HRA. This is a competitive salary for project-based research roles.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the CSIR CFTRI Project Associate - I Recruitment 2026 is online. Eligible candidates must submit their applications through the official website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: The selection process for Project Associate - I involves shortlisting by a designated committee, followed by an interview. Candidates will be evaluated based on their qualifications and performance.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the job location for Project Associate - I?
faq.answer: The job location for the Project Associate - I post is Mysuru, Karnataka, with pincode 570020. The project will be carried out at CSIR-CFTRI, Mysuru.
